home.title: Built for balance, styled for daily ritual.
home.description: Oriental Motion starts with slip resistance, balanced support, and breathable comfort, then brings Eastern wellness aesthetics into daily shoes, apparel, and future member rituals.
home.seoTitle: Eastern Performance Wellness Footwear and Apparel for Daily Movement
home.seoDescription: Shop Oriental Motion for US-market Eastern wellness footwear, breathable apparel, slip-resistant Tai Chi shoes, and future ritual member care.
home.collectionDescription: Shoes, breathable layers, and ritual kits designed for practice, errands, travel, and gifting.
home.technologyDescription: Textured grip, responsive cushioning, and hemp-silk inspired uppers support movement without making the shoe feel clinical.
home.ritualTitle: A member ritual layer, ready for what comes next
home.ritualDescription: Care notes, seasonal prompts, and future QR/NFC touchpoints are designed to keep the product useful after the first wear.
home.journalDescription: Short reads on safety, natural-touch materials, and practical wellness gifting.

commerce.careCopy: Air between wears, wipe gently after wet floors, and keep away from direct heat so the materials stay composed.
commerce.proofCopy: Designed around grounded traction, balanced support, and calm daily ritual.
commerce.allCollectionsDescription: Explore footwear, apparel, and ritual kits designed for balanced movement and calm daily care.

footer.newsletter: Receive care notes and member ritual previews.

technology.title: Built for traction, balance, and breathable ease.
technology.description: Our launch system focuses on slip-resistant outsoles, low-profile stability, soft natural-touch uppers, and details that help daily movement feel composed.
technology.seoTitle: Slip-Resistant Tai Chi Shoes and Eastern Wellness Technology
technology.seoDescription: Explore Oriental Motion wet-grip outsoles, cushioned midsoles, breathable hemp-silk material systems, and restrained Eastern design language.

sections.title: Wet grip outsole
sections.body: A textured rubber pattern helps smooth indoor floors, damp entries, and practice transitions feel more controlled.

sections.title: Nitrogen midsole feel
sections.body: Soft, resilient cushioning supports everyday walking without lifting the foot too far from ground feedback.

sections.title: Hemp-silk material system
sections.body: Natural-touch uppers and apparel layers prioritize breathability, gentle texture, and easy care for daily use.

sections.title: Restrained Eastern design language
sections.body: Quiet lines, low profiles, and composed colors reference wellness traditions while staying wearable in modern US routines.

membership.title: A future ritual membership for guided care.
membership.description: Members will receive seasonal movement notes, product care, gifting access, and wellness kit previews designed around calm daily routines.
membership.seoTitle: Oriental Motion Membership and Ritual Kit Preview
membership.seoDescription: Preview future Oriental Motion QR and NFC care practices, member perks, and ritual kit concepts for long-term wellness retention.

items.title: QR and NFC care practices
items.body: Future product tags can open fit guidance, cleaning notes, movement prompts, and seasonal care rituals without requiring login.

items.title: Member perks
items.body: Early kit previews, care reminders, gifting access, and limited color notices can reward repeat daily use.

items.title: Ritual kit retention
items.body: Footwear, apparel, tea-time notes, and care objects can become a replenishable system instead of a one-time purchase.

about.title: Eastern wellness, made practical.
about.description: Oriental Motion translates tai chi balance, natural materials, and gifting rituals into functional products for modern homes and city routines.
about.seoTitle: About Oriental Motion Eastern Wellness Footwear
about.seoDescription: Learn how Oriental Motion blends Eastern wellness, modern performance, US daily movement, and natural material philosophy.

sections.title: Eastern wellness
sections.body: The brand begins with balance, breath, and the grounded rhythm of tai chi rather than trend-led athletic spectacle.

sections.title: Modern performance
sections.body: Slip resistance, cushioning, flexible support, and washable layers make the wellness idea practical for real routines.

sections.title: US daily movement
sections.body: Products are shaped for errands, indoor practice, travel days, home entry, gifting, and the mixed pace of American city life.

sections.title: Material philosophy
sections.body: Hemp-touch, silk-soft, breathable materials create a natural feeling while staying durable enough for daily wear.

journal.title: Journal
journal.description: Practical notes on slip resistance, Eastern wellness materials, gifting, and daily movement.
journal.seoDescription: Read Oriental Motion articles about Tai Chi shoes, natural-touch wellness apparel, and practical ritual gifting.
